content:
#!/bin/bash
# Train CLIP model with moderate augmentation + mixup for 20 epochs
torchrun --nproc_per_node=4 train_both.py \
    --epochs 20 \
    --batch_size 64 \
    --lr 1e-4 \
    --backbone_lr 1e-5 \
    --weight_decay 0.05 \
    --model_type clip \
    --backbone vit_base_patch16_clip_224.openai \
    --sketch_prob 0.30 \
    --gray_prob 0.50 \
    --drop_rate 0.1 \
    --label_smoothing 0.1 \
    --mixup_alpha 0.2 \
    --warmup_epochs 1 \
    --save_path checkpoints/clip_mixup.pt
